sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25247" key="diamemerisme/nws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαμεμερισμένως</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διαμερίζω</etym>) <sense id="n25247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">separately,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γράφειν</foreign> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0003.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.191" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.191</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
